# Pull requests are not accepted in this repository

This is the **public issue tracker** for the F5 Playgrounds collection — it intentionally contains no source code.

If you'd like to:

- 🐛 **Report a bug** → [open a Bug Report](https://github.com/darshandkd/F5-Playgrounds-feedback/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- ✨ **Suggest a feature** → [open a Feature Request](https://github.com/darshandkd/F5-Playgrounds-feedback/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- ❓ **Ask a question** → [open a Question](https://github.com/darshandkd/F5-Playgrounds-feedback/issues/new?template=question.yml)

Please **close this PR** and file an Issue instead. The maintainer will be in touch.

— [@darshandkd](https://github.com/darshandkd)
